rationale: The citing paper’s core contribution is perceptual veridicality of rating *formats* (stars vs Arabic numerals, star-fill method, visual completion) across controlled experiments, whereas the cited paper is about cross-platform *review distribution polarity* and self-selection mechanisms. With only a DOI match and no in-text evidence of method/theory reuse, this looks more like broad online-review background context than a direct substantive dependency.
